Established in 1994 with a paid-in capital of nearly 13 Million RMB, its corporate structure is defined as a 'sole proprietorship invested or controlled by a non-natural person', a typical marker for state-affiliated or group-owned legacy entities. Despite its 'Manufacturing' classification, its 2024 insured workforce is only 9 employees, and its registered address is an inner-city location in Nanjing (Hanbei Street, Gulou District) rather than an industrial park. This indicates that it does not operate a physical manufacturing plant.
